permissions.fallback_msg: This skill needs to read local files (e.g., system_prompt.txt, training JSON example files) from the workspace. Allow?
This skill needs to write files to the workspace (e.g., scripts/dataset_manager.py, config files, example JSON sets). Allow?
This skill executes shell commands such as 'python scripts/dataset_manager.py' and 'uv add huggingface_hub'. Allow shell execution?
This skill installs the 'huggingface_hub' package via 'uv add huggingface_hub'. Allow package installation?
This skill reads the HF_TOKEN environment variable to authenticate with the Hugging Face Hub. Allow reading environment variables?
This skill reads the HF_TOKEN secret (a Write-access Hugging Face token) to authenticate API calls. Allow reading this secret?
This skill calls the Hugging Face Hub API to initialize repositories, upload configs, and stream row data. Allow external API calls to Hugging Face?
This skill submits dataset rows, configuration, and repository metadata to Hugging Face Hub endpoints. Allow outbound write-like web requests?
This skill fetches dataset statistics and metadata from Hugging Face Hub. Allow outbound HTTP read requests to Hugging Face?
This skill may invoke HF MCP server tools (e.g., search_datasets, get_dataset_details) for discovery and metadata retrieval. Allow MCP tool invocations?
This skill invokes registered tools such as HF MCP server tools for dataset discovery. Allow tool invocations?
